opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every joint in my body is aching, my heart races like crazy the moment I sit up, and I'm so exhausted I can barely function. I can't even get to the bathroom without my vision going grey and nearly blacking out. I have Ehlers-Danlos and I think this is one of my flares, but it's much worse than usual.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's got a lot worse over the last day and I can't stay upright at all now. I live on my own and I'm scared I'll fall and hurt myself.

symptom_narrative.onset: It ramped up over the last 24 hours, on top of my usual background problems.
symptom_narrative.duration: About a day for this bad patch, but the underlying thing has been going on for years in flares.
symptom_narrative.character: Aching, dragging pain in all my joints, and my heart pounding and racing whenever I'm upright.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: Really severe — the exhaustion is paralysing and I physically can't stand up.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: All my joints — shoulders, knees, hips, everywhere — and the racing feeling is in my chest whenever I sit up.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Worse the second I sit or stand; it eases off if I lie completely flat.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Lying down flat is the only thing that helps the racing and the dizziness.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Sitting up or standing — that's when my heart takes off and my vision greys out.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Dizziness, vision going grey when I stand, and crushing tiredness.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flares like this every so often, but this is one of the worst.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically bedbound — I've been sliding along the floor to get to the toilet so I don't faint.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: hypermobile Ehlers-Danlos syndrome — my joints are really loose and dislocate or sublux easily
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: diagnosed a few years ago after years of loose, painful joints

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing trouble with my heart racing and getting dizzy when I stand up — I've been told it's linked to the Ehlers-Danlos
past_medical_history.how_managed: salt, fluids and compression when I remember

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: as needed for the joint pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone with no one else in the house; has already moved the mattress to the floor and cleared pathways because of how often she nearly faints.

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch shows my heart rate going from about 80 when I'm lying down to around 140 when I stand up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer smartwatch, single readings, not a medical-grade monitor

objective_data_offered.value: I go really pale and washed-out looking as soon as I sit upright
